# Luxvibe

> Luxury hotel booking platform with competitive rates on boutique resorts and 5-star properties worldwide.

## What Luxvibe Does
Luxvibe helps travelers discover and book luxury hotels at competitive rates. Search by destination, dates, and guest count. Powered by LiteAPI with access to 2+ million properties globally.

## Key Destinations
Las Vegas, New York, Miami, Paris, London, Dubai, Tokyo, Bali, Barcelona, Rome, Bangkok, Amsterdam, Sydney, Chicago, San Francisco, Lisbon, Orlando, Cancun

## How to Book
Visit https://luxvibe.io, enter your destination and dates, compare rates, and book directly. No account required to search.

## Contact
bookings@luxvibe.io
